title: AddonsLib
description: A library to facilitate registration between mods, in particular macaw's bridges/roofs/fences/etc...
body:
This library makes it easier to register blocks for APIs such as Macaw's Bridges/Fences/Roofs/etc...
How can this be useful?
With this, compatibility mods all use the same code, reducing the number of mods.
It can also be useful for updates of original mods, allowing all crashes like NoclassFound to be corrected.

This mod can simply be installed without any mod, but that's not very useful.
